en: Once again, here are this year's nominees
ko: 올해의 최우수 오리지널 송 후보를 소개합니다.

en: All the Stars from Black Panther.
Music by Kendrick Lamar, Mark Soundwave Spears,
ko: 음악: Kendrick Lamar, Mark Soundwave Spears.

en: Lyric by Kendrick Lamar, SZA, and Anthony Top Dog Tiffin.
ko: 가사: Kendrick Lamar, SZA, Anthony Top Dog Tiffin.

en: Music and lyric by Diane Warren.
The Place Where Lost Things Go from Mary Poppins Returns. Music by Mark Shaman.
ko: 메리 포핀스 리턴즈의 The Place Where Lost Things Go. 음악: Mark Shaman.

en: Lyric by Scott Whitman and Mark Shaman.
Shallow from A Star is Born.
Music and lyric by Lady Gaga, Mark Ronson,
ko: 음악과 가사: Lady Gaga, Mark Ronson,

en: When a Cowboy Trades His Spurs for Wings
ko: When a Cowboy Trades His Spurs for Wings.

en: from The Ballad of Buster Scruggs.
ko: 더 발라드 오브 버스터 스크러그스의 곡입니다.

en: Music and lyric by Gillian Welch and David Rollins.
ko: 음악과 가사: 질리언 웰치, 데이비드 롤린스.

en: And the Oscar goes to, let's see.
